title: Tool-to-Agent Retrieval: Bridging Tools and Agents for Scalable LLM Multi-Agent Systems

defines.name: Tool-to-Agent Retrieval
defines.definition: A unified retrieval framework that embeds tools and their parent agents in a shared vector space and traverses metadata links to retrieve either individual tools or whole agent bundles.

problem: Existing retrieval methods for LLM multi-agent systems often obscure fine-grained tool functionality by matching queries only against coarse agent descriptions, leading to suboptimal routing and poor scalability.
